support.summary: No irreplaceable CEO action; exec overlay is Anthony Gray's job
support.detail: The commercial and executive levers here are all within the deal team's reach. Pricing pressure (buyer wants under the GBP 250k RFI line) is standard RSD/commercial work, and the needed executive overlay to the CFO is explicitly assigned to Anthony Gray (deal owner's manager). No blocked discount, roadmap veto, or CEO-to-CEO peer relationship is required that a VP/CRO could not handle.
support.metric: Amount GBP 150k, win 60, not large / not forecasted
support.why_not_vp: Every open lever (CFO peer call, sub-250k pricing, payment-partner roadmap positioning) is already assigned to Anthony Gray / a VP; nothing requires the CEO personally.

monitor.reason: The economic buyer (CFO) is running a competitor POC on the buyer's #1 pain - payments - where Zycus has no native module and no CFO engagement.

triggers.summary: CFO running live Renpayments POC on payments - buyer's top pain Zycus can't match natively
triggers.detail: Payment automation is Yondr's stated #1 pain and Zycus has no native payment module - only a partner-integration workaround that adds cost and risks breaching the GBP 250k budget line. The CFO (Sandy) is personally sponsoring a 2-week Renpayments POC that started mid-June and concludes now, yet Zycus has had zero CFO engagement in the record. If Ren proves out payments before we counter, the economic buyer decides on a capability we cannot match natively and the GBP 150k P2P deal is lost despite the operational team favoring Zycus.
triggers.metric: 2-week CFO-run Ren POC concluding early July; Zycus native payment module = none
triggers.ceo_ask: Ask Claire whether Anthony Gray has secured the CFO call before the Ren POC verdict, and how we neutralize Ren on payments given we have no native module.
triggers.evidence: Next Step (updated 2026-06-24): 'The CFO is looking into Renpayments - currently running a 2 week POC - The rest of the team really like Zycus, they have not had the deep dive with Ren yet.' competitive_position: Zycus lacks a native payment module; mitigation is partner integration that risks breaching the 250k budget line.
